[[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿三]] [[zh:十月廿三]] [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|200|ja|200}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|ja|袁紹}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|ja|曹操}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555|ja|1555}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenbun|lt_ja=天文}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿三]] [[zh:十月廿三]] [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|200|ja|200}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|ja|袁紹}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|ja|曹操}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555|ja|1555}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenbun|lt_ja=天文}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ). == See Also ==

[[Category:Tomobiki]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] {{cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] {{zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:十月廿三}} {{zh:十月廿三}} [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Days 23 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] {{cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] {{zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:十月廿三}} {{zh:十月廿三}} [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] {{cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] {{zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:十月廿三}} {{zh:十月廿三}} [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:11]][[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]]

[[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿三]] [[zh:十月廿三]] [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|200|ja|200}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|ja|袁紹}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|ja|曹操}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555|ja|1555}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenbun|lt_ja=天文}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==

[[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿三]] [[zh:十月廿三]] [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|200|ja|200}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|ja|袁紹}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|ja|曹操}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555|ja|1555}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenbun|lt_ja=天文}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿三]] [[zh:十月廿三]] [[en:draft:October 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|200|ja|200}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|ja|袁紹}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|ja|曹操}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1555|ja|1555}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenbun|lt_ja=天文}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1577|ja|1577}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月23日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[200年]][[11月17日]]） - [[官渡の戦い]]。[[袁紹]]の陣に[[曹操]]が夜襲 * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1555年]][[11月7日]]） - [[天文 (元号)|天文]]から弘治に[[改元]] * [[天正]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1577年]][[12月2日]]） - [[織田信長]]が[[豊臣秀吉|羽柴秀吉]]に[[中国攻め]]を命ずる * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が、風紀を乱すとして[[歌舞伎|女歌舞伎]]・女舞・[[浄瑠璃|女浄瑠璃]]を禁止 * [[寛文]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1669年]][[11月16日]]） - [[アイヌ]]の[[シャクシャイン]]が、和睦の為に訪ねた松前泰広の陣で謀殺される * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月5日]]） - [[東京府]]が邏卒（現在の[[巡査]]）を3千人設置
== 誕生日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1617年]][[11月21日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、画家（+ [[1691年]]） * [[宝暦]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月30日]]） - [[華岡青洲]]、医師・[[麻酔]]術を開発（+ [[1835年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1817年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小野友五郎]]、[[数学者]]（+ [[1898年]]） * [[嘉永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1849年]][[12月7日]]） - [[西園寺公望]]、12・14代[[内閣総理大臣]]・[[元老]]（+ [[1940年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月5日]]） - [[土井晩翠]]、[[詩人]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平神護]]元年（ユリウス暦[[765年]][[11月10日]]） - [[淳仁天皇]]、47代天皇 * [[寛文]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1669年]][[11月16日]]） - [[シャクシャイン]]、アイヌの総酋長
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月23日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[200年]][[11月17日]]） - [[官渡の戦い]]。[[袁紹]]の陣に[[曹操]]が夜襲 * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1555年]][[11月7日]]） - [[天文 (元号)|天文]]から弘治に[[改元]] * [[天正]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1577年]][[12月2日]]） - [[織田信長]]が[[豊臣秀吉|羽柴秀吉]]に[[中国攻め]]を命ずる * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が、風紀を乱すとして[[歌舞伎|女歌舞伎]]・女舞・[[浄瑠璃|女浄瑠璃]]を禁止 * [[寛文]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1669年]][[11月16日]]） - [[アイヌ]]の[[シャクシャイン]]が、和睦の為に訪ねた松前泰広の陣で謀殺される * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月5日]]） - [[東京府]]が邏卒（現在の[[巡査]]）を3千人設置
== 誕生日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1617年]][[11月21日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、画家（+ [[1691年]]） * [[宝暦]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月30日]]） - [[華岡青洲]]、医師・[[麻酔]]術を開発（+ [[1835年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1817年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小野友五郎]]、[[数学者]]（+ [[1898年]]） * [[嘉永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1849年]][[12月7日]]） - [[西園寺公望]]、12・14代[[内閣総理大臣]]・[[元老]]（+ [[1940年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月5日]]） - [[土井晩翠]]、[[詩人]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天平神護]]元年（ユリウス暦[[765年]][[11月10日]]） - [[淳仁天皇]]、47代天皇 * [[寛文]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1669年]][[11月16日]]） - [[シャクシャイン]]、アイヌの総酋長

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840386]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|qq=|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|qq=|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|qq=|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840386]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
