== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840386]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840386]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

[[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840386]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night attack by [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] . * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1555|1555]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1577|1577]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

[[:en:200|200]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as [[:en:Yuan Shao|Yuan Shao]] faced a night == Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿三]][[zh:十月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840386]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|200|en|200|WD=Q23813|lt=200}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|en|Yuan Shao|WD=Q337013|lt=Yuan Shao}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1555|en|1555|WD=Q6579|lt=1555}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|WD=Q7602|lt=1669}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.

30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Hanaoka Seishū|en|Hanaoka Seishū|WD=Q1376935|lt=Kawaoka Seishū}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1817|en|1817|WD=Q6958|lt=1817}} {{ill|December calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|WD=Q2300|lt=December 5}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} (* {{ill|1045|en|1045|WD=Q19351|lt=1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Komatsu|en|Emperor {{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Kengan (Han)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|200|en|200|WD=Q23813|lt=200}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|en|Yuan Shao|WD=Q337013|lt=Yuan Shao}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1555|en|1555|WD=Q6579|lt=1555}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|WD=Q7602|lt=1669}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genwa (Japan)}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1617|en|1617|WD=Q6798|lt=1617}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuoki|en|Tosa Mitsuoki|WD=Q3180225|lt=Tosa Mitsuki}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|en|1691|WD=Q7682|lt=1691}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1760|en|1760|WD=Q7646|lt=1760}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Hanaoka Seishū|en|Hanaoka Seishū|WD=Q1376935|lt=Kawaoka Seishū}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1817|en|1817|WD=Q6958|lt=1817}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1849|en|1849|WD=Q7650|lt=1849}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|en|Saionji Kinmochi|WD=Q297628|lt=Saionji Kinmochi}} , who served as Prime Minister on two occasions and as genrō († {{ill|1940|en|1940|WD=Q18633|lt=1940}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|WD=Q2300|lt=December 5}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|765|en|765|WD=Q31216|lt=765}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Junnin}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|WD=Q7602|lt=1669}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|976|en|976|WD=Q23782|lt=976}} {{ill|November 14|en|November 14|WD=Q2983|lt=November 14}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Taizu of Song|en|Emperor Taizu of Song|WD=Q7471|lt=Zhao Kuangyin}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|en|927|WD=Q30470|lt=927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|WD=Q3083118|lt=Minamoto no Yoshimitsu}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} (* {{ill|1045|en|1045|WD=Q19351|lt=1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Komatsu|en|Emperor Go-Komatsu|WD=Q123052|lt=Go-Komatsu}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|en|1377|WD=Q6289|lt=1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|en|Ninomiya Sontoku|WD=Q968964|lt=Ninomiya Sontoku}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787}} ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 23|qq=October 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kengan (Han)|ja|建安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kengan (Han)|1=Q1305394|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305394}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|200|en|200|WD=Q23813|lt=200|1=200}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17|1=November 17}} ） – During the Han, when Prince Shangchen’s rebellion occurred, the capital battle at Guandu took place as {{ill|Yuan Shao|en|Yuan Shao|WD=Q337013|lt=Yuan Shao|1=Yuan Shao}} faced a night attack by {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao|1=Cao Cao}} . * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1555|en|1555|WD=Q6579|lt=1555|1=1555}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7|1=November 7}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} to {{ill|Kōji|ja|Kōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577|1=1577}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2|1=December 2}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} ordered {{ill|Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|lt=Hideyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiyoshi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} to launch an expedition against China. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629|1=1629}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7|1=December 7}} ） – The Edo Shogunate banned female kabuki, female dance, and female jōruri for disrupting public order. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|WD=Q7602|lt=1669|1=1669}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16|1=November 16}} ） – An Ainu chieftain, {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , was murdered during peace talks at Matsumae Taihira’s encampment. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}} ） – The Meiji government’s general affairs were reorganized: for instance, {{Enomoto Takeaki|qq=}} and others occupied the Goryōkaku in Hakodate.
